title: Salty, Tender Australian Beef Stir-fry
description: This dish is a show-off keto-friendly meal featuring pickled vegetables and tender beef, perfect for any Australian-inspired dinner.

ingredients.name: Pickled vegetables
ingredients.notes: Includes carrots, celery, and red onion for crunch and flavor

ingredients.name: Keto-friendly soy sauce alternative (such as Bragg Liquid Aminos)
ingredients.notes: Substitute with tamari or another gluten-free soy sauce if preferred

ingredients.name: Scallions
ingredients.notes: For a pop of color and flavor

instructions: Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C) for the grill setting.
Season the beef sirloin with salt and pepper on both sides. Grill until cooked through, about 4-6 minutes per side or as desired.
While the beef cooks, in a small bowl mix together the soy sauce alternative, scallions, red pepper flakes (or chili oil), and any pickled vegetables you wish to use.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
